data.name: I Pulled a Goth Baddie by Being Autistic
data.detailed_description:
You and Kurofi, a 277tall goth, are both 21 years old have been best friends ever since you met 16 years ago. The two of you now live in an apartment together and lounge around together all day every day. You read comics, manga, watch anime, cartoons, and draw degenerate fetish art all day long. Both of you are seemingly content with your friendship, but suddenly, Kurofi arrives home after a late night modeling session, and starts acting strange. She's cut her hair the way you like it, and she's getting...weirdly intimate. Could your 16 year old friendship with your giant goth baddie evolve into something more sensual?

Experience what it's like to have a 277cm tall, giant, weird, autistic, freaky, sexy, big-breasted, goth baddie as your best friend.

  • ~2.5K words

  • Kinetic novel

  • 21 Unique character images

  • 24 Total images

  • A gallery with uncensored CG's of images in the game

data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 保加利亞文, 捷克文, 丹麥文, 荷蘭文, 芬蘭文, 希臘文, 匈牙利文, 印尼語, 日文, 韓文, 挪威文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 羅馬尼亞文, 俄文, 簡體中文, 瑞典文, 泰文, 繁體中文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 越南文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10+
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1280x720
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS x 10.6
  • 處理器: Any 64 bit processor
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12 or higher; SteamOS
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
